name: LlmApiResponse
description: Response from the Wolfram|Alpha LLM API containing computed results.

query.description: The original query that was submitted.
query.example: What is the boiling point of water?

inputInterpretation.description: Wolfram|Alpha's interpretation of the input query.

result.description: The primary computed result for the query.

images.description: List of image URLs related to the query results.

link.description: URL to the full Wolfram|Alpha results page for this query.
